hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Book a car inspection
hero.subtitle: Pre-purchase car inspection in Kaunas, Vilnius, Klaipėda, Šiauliai, Panevėžys and across Lithuania. Get in touch, we respond within a few hours.

form.label: Inquiry
form.title: Car inspection booking
form.subtitle: Share the car details and preferred time. We will respond as soon as possible.
form.message_placeholder: Anything important about the car, seller, or timing?
form.success: Inquiry sent. We will respond as soon as possible.
form.rate_limited: Too many inquiries were sent. Please try again later.
form.error: The inquiry could not be sent. Please try again or email info@checkauto.lt.
